snippet.title: Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer | Panja Vaisshnav Tej | Krithi Shetty | Vijay Sethupathi | Buchi Babu
snippet.description:
Uppena Telugu Movie Trailer on Mythri Movie Makers. #Uppena Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Panja Vaisshnav Tej, Vijay Sethupathi and Krithi Shetty. Written & Directed by Buchi Babu Sana. Music by DSP / Devi Sri Prasad. Presented by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers & Sukumar Writings banners.

Uppena Trailer is officially released by Young Tiger NTR.

The tale of an incredible love, Uppena movie is all set for a Grand Release in theaters on February 12th, 2021.

#PanjaVaisshnavTej #VijaySethupathi #KrithiShetty #UppenaTrailer #BuchiBabuSana #DSP #DeviSriPrasad #MythriMovieMakers

snippet.title: Check Telugu Movie Official Trailer | Nithiin | Rakul Preet | Priya Varrier | Chandra Sekhar Yeleti
snippet.description:

Check is all set for a Grand Release in theaters from February 26th 2021.

Written and Directed by Chandra Sekhar Yeleti
Produced by V. Ananda Prasad
Starring:  Nithiin, Rakul Preeth Singh,  Priya Prakash Varrier,  Simran Choudary,  Posani Krishna Murali, Sai Chand, Murali Sharma, Harsha Vardhan, Sampath Raj,  Rohit Pathak, Virendra Chauhan, Chaitanya Krishna, Gururaj Manepalli, Raina Rao, Karthik Ratnam, Praveen Yendamuri, Krishna Teja, Aziz Nazar, C.V.L. snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at http://bit.ly/Friend_OctaFX​ and get 5000 USD in your demo account 💵. Start studying forex trading with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFX.🏆📈

RVCJ Originals presents the new web series “FRIEND REQUEST”, starring Badri Chavan, Anjali Barot, Arun Kushwah (Chote Miyan), Pratish Mehta and Mehek Mehra.

Friend Request is a story revolving around a bunch of Engineering students and their fights as their lives are intertwined with a mischievous comment made by Munni on their engineering group. This leads to an epic war amongst all of them, especially between Vikram & Aditi who have taken this fight too personally. Will the blast from the past spoil Vikram and Aditi's relation forever? Find out in the Season Finale of "Friend Request" now!
 
There would be Some Jhagde, Some Masti, Some Musibat and Lots of Dosti with Vikram, Aditi, Munni, Dheeraj and Juhi in all-new episodes of “Friend Request”

snippet.title: realme X7 Pro Indian Unit Unboxing And First Impressions | Giveaway ⚡ Dimensity 1000+, 120Hz & More
snippet.description:
Hello Dosto, aaj hum unbox kar rahe hain realme X7 Pro ko. Kya ye ek flagship killer hain? Janiye sabkuch iss device ke baare me To Iss Video Ko Ant Tak Dekhiye Aur video ko like aur share karna na bhoole.

#realmeX7Pro ​ #realmeX7ProUnboxing #realmeX7 #TrakinTech 

Check Out realme X7 Pro : http://bit.ly/3awo9IH

Giveaway Rules & Regulations
1) Like This Video & Comment on this video with the best feature you liked about this phone.
2) Go to this link - https://gleam.io/DVwnp/trakintech-realme-x7-pro-5g-giveaway
3) You should be a citizen of India and be subscribed to our channel to qualify for this Giveaway.
4) The Giveaway will be open for participation till 18th Feb.
5) We will announce the winners live on Instagram & Twitter On 19th or 20th Feb.
6) The winners will be chosen on Gleam platform which picks up random participants
7) You will need to abide by YouTube Guidelines for participation in this Giveaway

snippet.title: RiRi (Rihanna) Song By Diljit Dosanjh | Intense | Raj Ranjodh
snippet.description:
Presenting RiRi (Rihanna) full audio song performed by DILJIT DOSANJH 
SUBSCRIBE to channel ► https://bit.ly/diljitdosanjhchannel
 #DiljitDosanjh

Song: RiRi
Singer: Diljit Dosanjh
Lyricist - Raj Ranjodh 
Music - Intense

Lyrics Translation:-

Oh Beautiful One of Barbados, 
Your skin tone golden as though born of wheat.
Raj (lyricist) salutes the Almighty, 
Who set this Angelic Beauty on Earth.

I'll gift you a special Patiala Style Outfit,
I'll buy you Anklets, I'm Crazy for you.
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

You have big wide eyes, 
you are a true treasure of Beauty
I'll be at your Concert, wearing a Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

Oh the things your eyes do to us,
You have Punjabi Fans crazy for you, Ms. Fenty Beauty
The Breadth of your Fan Base makes the haters burn with jealousy
In the middle of the night, tossed them haters into trolley

The world is in a Trance behind your sway
Oh Rihanna, Oh Rihanna
Try on this Punjabi Outfit i had sewn for you from Moga, Oh Rihanna
I'll be at your concert wearing Kurta Pajama
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna
Oh Rihanna

snippet.title: The Girl On The Train | Official Trailer | Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari & Kirti Kulhari
snippet.description:
The journey has begun and there's no turning back. Are you in?

A bright city, a dull morning and a curious girl on the train. When a voyeuristic divorcee fixates on the lives of a perfect couple from afar, she soon gets embroiled in a murder mystery that unfolds revealing truths about her own life. Get on board a thrilling experience with Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kirti Kulhari and Avinash Tiwary. Catch Ribhu Dasgupta's The Girl On The Train on 26th February, only on Netflix.

Official Teaser: https://youtu.be/3iH0YehfMB0

Website: https://www.netflix.com/

snippet.title: We are a 'Dry State' | Comedy | Dreamz Unlimited
snippet.description:
Nagaland Liquor Total Prohibition (NLTP) Act, 1989 was passed on Nagaland Legislative Assembly in 1989. Those who support alcohol prohibition point at the dangers of drinking, the lives it has destroyed and the misery caused. They no doubt have a point, but some countered that alcohol consumption should be regulated in public interest, and not totally prohibited.
Nevertheless, Nagaland became a ‘dry state’ and instead of drinking legally, people started drinking ‘illegally.’
The inflow of liquor into the dry state has since remained regular and adequate for the consumers over the last 31 years and hundreds of people are arrested every year for “contravention of the provision” of the Act.
This video is a satire take on the subject.

Concept & Production
Dreamz Unlimited Team

Follow us on Instagram 

https://www.instagram.com/dreamzunlim​...

Facebook

https://www.facebook.com/DreamzUnlimi​...

snippet.title: Gajendra Verma | Kitna Maza Aayega | Summary - Chapter 02
snippet.description:
Official Video of Gajendra Verma's - Kitna Maza Aayega  from the Album "Summary" - Chapter 02

"Summary - A Musical Series" is a romantic tale. The story starts with the first song and ends with the fifth song. A musical series on the summary of love taking romance to a whole new level along with the most beloved pair essayed by singer Gajendra Verma and beautiful Manasi Moghe. 

Listen Here:
http://bit.ly/Kitna-Maza-Aayega_Spotify
http://bit.ly/Kitna-Maza-Aayega_Gaana
http://bit.ly/Kitna-Maza-Aayega_Hungama
http://bit.ly/Kitna-Maza-Aayega_WymkMusic
http://bit.ly/Kitna-Maza-Aayega_iTunes
http://bit.ly/Kitna-Maza-Aayega_AppleMusic

Watch Here Chapter 01 - Mushkil Badi
http://bit.ly/Gajendra_Verma-MushkilBadi-OfficialVideo

Subscribe to the Gajendra Verma Channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances
http://bit.ly/SubscribeToGajendraVerma

See more official videos from Gajendra Verma here: 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0KNk-Joi-NM&list=PLTGJmH_RBpkEI18DUASS-BUKBCCcI679u

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iVermaGajendra
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ivermagajen...
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ivermagajendra

VIDEO CREDITS

Editor: Gagan Sharma

Line Producer: Uluc Yemen Aslan 
Line Producer India: Bijal Sunil Majithiya       
Production Manager: Hazal Caglayan        
Drone Pilot : Oğuz Albayrak 
Drone Camera: Sinan kılıç
Production Team:  Erhan Caylak & Gizem Demir 
Production Asst: Riad Afandiyev    
Makeup: Tamay Esintimur          
Makeup Asst: Selin Arier 
Makeup (Posters): Anshu Gautam
PR Team: Shruti Dahibavkar & Harish Pednekar
Social Media: Jasmeet Kaur, Bhisham Soni
Agency: Qyuki Digital Media
Record Label: Virtual Planet Music
Virtual Planet Team: Akshay Jain, Krishna Kishore, Preet Bhullar, Mohit Rajyaguru, Sourabh Swami & Amit Kumar

LYRICS:

Soch, Kitna Maza Ayega,
Jab Hum Tum, Pahaado Ke Shehar Mein Rahenge
Aur Tere Mere Din Bhi Kuch Ghanto Mei Guzrenge
Soch, Kitna Maza Ayega,
Jab Hum Tum Bs Ek He Sadak Pe Chalenge
Hathoon Mein Hath Liye, Bas Baatein Karenge 

Baatein, Kuch Anjaani Si, Kuch Nakli Si, Kuch Diwaani Si, 
Oooo Humpe Ye Samaa Bhi Muskurayega….
Soch, Kitna Mazza Ayega….
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha 
Mazaa Ayega….
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha

Trumpet Music……

Ek Aam Ka Paudha, Jo Bachpan Mein Boya Tha 
Ek Raja Ka Beta, Jo Jungle Mein Khoya Tha…
Ek Aam Ka Paudha, Jo Bachpan Mein Boya Tha
Ek Raja Ka Beta, Jo Jungle Mein Khoya Tha

Oo Teri Ye Sab Baatein, Mujhe Achi Lagti Hai
O Jab Tu Choti Si, Aur Pyari Si,Paanch Saal Ki, Ek Bachhi Lagti Hai 
Ho... Koi Puraan Quissa Tere Chehre Pe, Hansi Layega…
Soch Kitna Maza Ayega….. Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha
Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha, Ha, Ha Ha 
Maza Ayega…

Trumpet Music  

For Live Shows Bookings & Business Enquiries: 
Prashant Chaudhary +919988989833

© 2021, Virtual Planet Production Pvt. Ltd.
#Summary #GajendraVerma #KitnaMajaAayega

snippet.title: 'Haldia এ Modi এর মঞ্চে Dev, Sisir', Soumitra এর Tweet ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': Dev
snippet.description:
'Haldia এ Modi এর মঞ্চে Dev, Sisir', Soumitra এর Tweet ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': Dev

'হলদিয়ায় মোদী এর মঞ্চে দেব, শিশির অধিকারী', সৌমিত্র খাঁ এর টুইট ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': দেব

'Haldia এ Modi এর মঞ্চে Dev, Sisir', Soumitra এর Tweet ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': Dev

'হলদিয়ায় মোদী এর মঞ্চে দেব, শিশির অধিকারী', সৌমিত্র খাঁ এর টুইট ঘিরে শোরগোল, 'আমন্ত্রণের জন্য ধন্যবাদ': দেব

#NarendraModi #SoumitraKhan #Dev

snippet.title: GPS - Official Short Film | PRK Short | Gopalkrishna Deshpande | Raghunandan Kaanadka
snippet.description:
Presenting the Official Short Film 'GPS' Directed by Raghunandan Kaanadka.

A cab driver has lost his way after dropping a passenger in a remote outskirts of Bangalore, trying to find his way back using his mobile GPS, but his mobile too dies out of charge and an unintentionally invited guest accompanies him and tries to assist his way back to his life.The Drama unfolds between them as they encounter the journey together, will they find peace with each other, or within themselves?

CAST : Gopalkrishna Deshpande | Manjunath Hegade | Anand Tumkur | Kiran Nayak | Divya Bajpai | Pragathi Prabhu | Prabhudev Hosdurga | Baby ankitha
Production House: FLAUNGE | TEEPOI FILMS
Direction :Raghunandan Kaanadka
Script: Flaunge writers’ Block in association with satyan Balaga
Original Short Story : Raghunandan Kaanadka
Dialogues: Sampath Sirimane 
Associate Director : Punith Kabbur
Co-wiriters: Chetan K C |Karthik R |Padmaprasad Jain |Swaroop P Diwakar|
Director of photography : Vishwesh Shiva Prasad
Associate Cinematographer : Vinayak
Executive Producer: Kiran Midigeshi
Music Direction: Navaneeth Sham
Editor: Raghunandan Kaanadka
VFX: Redin Kumar | Novefel Nagore
Assistant Directors: Shamanth Chandra |Arjun A R |Mahantesh Doddamani|Phani Raj
Publicity Designs: Kaani studio
Art Director: Sridhar Murthy
Sound designer: Aravind Menon
SFX: Shibin naduveettil

PRK Digital & Social Media: Satish V and Badarinath Venkatesh
PRK Team: Gururaj R Gangemane and Girija Nagendra

https://www.facebook.com/prkaudiooffi...

snippet.title: નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીએ અમિત શાહના પુત્ર વિશે શું કહ્યું? BBC Exclusive
snippet.description:
#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi #prahladmodi 

ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીને લઈને તમામ પક્ષોએ તૈયારી શરૂ કરી દીધી છે. 

નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીના પુત્રી સોનલ મોદી આ ચૂંટણીમાં ઉમેદવારી નોંધાવી રહ્યા છે. 

બીબીસી સંવાદદાતા તેજસ વૈદ્યએ પ્રહ્લાદભાઈ સાથે વાત કરી. 

વીડિયો : ઉત્સવ ગજ્જર 

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો : 

Website : https://www.bbc.com/gujarati 
Facebook : https://bit.ly/2nRrazj 
Instagram : https://bit.ly/2oE5W7S 
Twitter : https://bit.ly/2oLSi2r 
JioChat Channel : BBC Gujarati 
Helo : BBC News ગુજરાતી 
ShareChat : bbcnewsgujarati

snippet.title: Prime Time With Ravish Kumar: लोकतंत्र में कोई चीज अंदर की बात नहीं होती
snippet.description:
Prime Time With Ravish Kumar - February 4, 2021: समाचार का मतलब ही होता है कि अंदर की बात को बाहर लाना. हमारे फिल्म कलाकारों, खिलाड़ियों ने एक काम अच्छा किया कि उन्होंने सीएनएन (CNN), वाशिंगटन पोस्ट (Washington Post), न्यूयॉर्क टाइम्स (New York Times), बीबीसी (BBC) को नहीं धिक्कारा कि वे किसान आंदोलन (Farmers Protest) की खबरों को न दिखाएं. इस दलील से तो भारतीय वेबसाइटों को अमेरिका और लंदन की खबरों के लिए रोक देना चाहिए. पॉप सिंगर रिहाना ने ट्वीट क्या कर दिया कि ये सब सामने यह कहने आ गए कि यह अंदर की बात है. लोकतांत्रिक भावना सिर्फ अपने लिए नहीं होती है. दूसरे देशों के लिए महसूस की जाती है. लोकतंत्र (Democracy) में यकीन करने वाला नागरिक सच्चे अर्थों में वैश्विक नागरिक होता है.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें : https://www.youtube.com/user/ndtvindia?sub_confirmation=1
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें : https://www.facebook.com/NDTVIndia
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें : https://twitter.com/ndtvindia
NDTV Apps डाउनलोड करें : http://www.ndtv.com/page/apps
अन्य वीडियो देखें : https://khabar.ndtv.com/videos
हमें इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें : https://www.instagram.com/ndtvindia/

फ़ूड वीडियो के लिए NDTV ज़ायका सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8affpNLjC7-EhiAeTuGZ6g/?guided_help_flow=5

हेल्थ वीडियो के लिए NDTV सेहत वेहत सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBtSjjjxahfjdZTZiLKXkhw?view_as=subscriber

Prime Time With Ravish Kumar - February 4, 2021: समाचार का मतलब ही होता है कि अंदर की बात को बाहर लाना. हमारे फिल्म कलाकारों, खिलाड़ियों ने एक काम अच्छा किया कि उन्होंने सीएनएन (CNN), वाशिंगटन पोस्ट (Washington Post), न्यूयॉर्क टाइम्स (New York Times), बीबीसी (BBC) को नहीं धिक्कारा कि वे किसान आंदोलन (Farmers Protest) की खबरों को न दिखाएं. इस दलील से तो भारतीय वेबसाइटों को अमेरिका और लंदन की खबरों के लिए रोक देना चाहिए. पॉप सिंगर रिहाना ने ट्वीट क्या कर दिया कि ये सब सामने यह कहने आ गए कि यह अंदर की बात है. लोकतांत्रिक भावना सिर्फ अपने लिए नहीं होती है. दूसरे देशों के लिए महसूस की जाती है. लोकतंत्र (Democracy) में यकीन करने वाला नागरिक सच्चे अर्थों में वैश्विक नागरिक होता है.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

snippet.title: How a dog survived night in a toilet with leopard in Karnataka
snippet.description: Now, dog Bollu has a formidable reputation among the mongrels of Bilinele village in Dakshina Kannada, having survived a night and day with a leopard in a toilet, at the end of which he walked out while the leopard darted through the roof. And the dog survived the horror. Jayalakshmi, the owner of the house, was at her relative’s on Tuesday night, when the leopard likely strayed in from the adjacent Kombaru reserve forest. Early Wednesday morning, a family member saw the stout tail of the leopard through the toilet door. Without skipping a beat, she locked the door and went on to call forest officials. What bystanders captured through the toilet window was intriguing: the leopard curled into a corner, and diagonally opposite was Bollu, each apparently having marked their territory in captivity. The house belongs to late Venkappa Gowda of Moolemane in Kaikamba. “It is located adjacent to Kombaru forest. The leopard may have entered human habitation chasing the dog at night. And while the dog took shelter in the toilet, the leopard probably followed it,” said Subrahmanya Range RFO HT Raghavendra. The two remained closeted, in a space barely 3 feet by four feet, until 1.45pm on Wednesday when the big cat made a dash for it. Through the morning, forest officials placed two layers of nets on the asbestos sheets that served as the toilet roof and got permission to dart the animal.

snippet.title: Kuruluş Osman 44. Bölüm
snippet.description:
44.Bölüm Özeti:
Savcı Bey’in sürpriz hamlesi!

Osman Bey’in kararı ile obadan sürülen Göktuğ ve Targun, intikam için Bizans’la ittifak yapar ve güçlerini Flatyos’la birleştirir. Dündar Bey, Nikola ile görüşmek üzere bir kez daha İnegöl Kalesi’nin yolunu tutarken, çaresiz kalan Lena, Bayhoca’yı geri alabilmek için Flatyos’tan yardım ister. Savcı Bey’in oğlunu kurtarmak için yaptığı hamle pahalıya mal olurken; tüm cephelerde baskı altında kalan Osman Bey, Nikola’yı hiç beklemediği bir yerden vurmak üzere herkesi şaşırtacak bir strateji kurar. 

Göktuğ ve Targun intikam peşinde…

Osman Bey, Bayhoca’ya karşılık Kulucahisar Kalesi’ni teslim edecek mi? Savcı Bey, oğlunu kurtarmak için nasıl bir plan yapacak? Nikola, Dündar Bey’e nasıl bir vaatte bulunacak? Göktuğ ve Targun’un hedefi ne? Lena Hatun’un Flatyos’tan yardım talebinin sonuçları ne olacak? Bala Hatun, Osman Bey için bulduğu yeni eş adayını nasıl bir sınava tabi tutacak?

O, kömür karası gözleriyle, gaza ve hürriyet ateşini tutuşturacaktı. 

Adı, Ertuğrul Gazi oğlu Osman’dı… 

Karanlığın içinde ona yol gösteren “aşk” oldu…

Kan ve gözyaşıyla sulanan topraklarda, gök ekini gibi biçilen; yedi göğü, yedi yeri, dağları, denizleri aşacak bir milletin rüyasını “aşkla” gördü.

Gücünü kılıcından değil, “aşktan” aldı… Zorbalığa adaletle; köleliğe hürriyetle direnen, tarihin gördüğü en büyük imparatorluğa adını “aşkla” verdi.

72 milleti kıran bozuk düzene karşı başkaldırı, mazlumların sessiz çığlığına umut, Kuruluş’un adı oldu…

Kuruluş Osman… 400 çadırlık bir obadan, “ilahi aşkla” kurulan bir cihan imparatorluğuna yürüyüşün hikayesi.

Abone Olmak için ; https://bit.ly/2t8pQdU

atv Resmi YouTube Kanalına Abone Olmak İçin; https://goo.gl/dmrDLN

snippet.title: ही एक ग्रेवी बनवुन ठेवा आणि हवं तेव्हा हॉटेलसारखी कोणतीही डिश फक्त 10 मिनिटात बनवा/All purpose gravy
snippet.description:
In this video I will share recipe of restaurant style all purpose gravy, using this gravy you can make many dishes within 10-15 mins and tastes awesome.

या विडियो मध्ये आपण पाहणार आहोत हॉटेल मध्ये वापरली जाणारी ग्रेवी जी वापरून बर्‍याच प्रकारच्या डिश आपण 10-15 मिनिटात बनवू शकतो.. 

Ingredients / साहित्य ( 4 restaurant style dishes / 4 डिश साठी) 

Tomato / टोमॅटो 500gms 
Onion / कांदे 500gms 
Ginger / आले 50gms
Garlic / लसुण 50gms
Pumpkin seeds / मगज बी 50gms
Cadhew / काजू 25-30
Oil / तेल 6-7 tbsp
Bay leaf / तमालपत्र 4-5
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 2 inch
Black cardamom / मसाला वेलची 1
Green cardamom / हिरव्या वेलची 6-7
Cloves / लवंगा 7-8
Cumin seeds / जीरे 1 tbsp
Salt / मीठ 
Corriender powder / धणे पूड 2 tsp
Sugar / साखर 2 tsp
Red chilly powder / लाल मिरची पावडर 1&1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1 tsp

#allpurposegravy
#hotelsarkhigravy
#ग्रेवीएकसब्जियांअनेक
#ग्रेवीएकभाज्याअनेक 
#gravyeksabjiyaanek
#allpurposegravy
#testaurantstylegravy
#saritaskitchen

snippet.title: Angana Morey | Shreya Ghoshal & Soumyadeep Ghoshal
snippet.description:
Shreya Ghoshal teams up with her talented brother, Soumyadeep Ghoshal to compose and produce this intense yet intricate electronic pop ode to the feeling of longing, titled “Angana Morey”. 
Sung by the inimitable Shreya Ghoshal, Angana Morey, is rooted, earthy and intense. Shreya makes her presence felt through her idiomatic phrasing, penning words that invoke the bittersweet feeling of longing and reunion. Shreya’s lyrics and singing, transport you into a satisfying trance, while Soumyadeep switches to top gear with his intelligent production, fusing electronic layers with the magnanimous Budapest Symphony Orchestra, guitars, tabla and distinguished flute parts that all converge into a dramatic confluence!
The song is Shreya’s contemporary interpretation of the girl longing for her beloved, deeply in love for each other, but away from her. The raag, the composition and the music are encapsulating and transport you like a whirlwind from one universe to another, visually captured by the choreography and life like projections in the video.

Singer, Composer, Lyricist : Shreya Ghoshal
Music Produced by : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Additional Production, Live Strings Orchestrated by : Samarth Srinivasan
Tabla : Nitin Mitta
Flute : Rajeev Prasanna
Guitars : Soumyadeep Ghoshal
Live Strings : Budapest Art Orchestra
Mixed and Mastered by Aftab Khan at Headroom Studio, Mumbai 
Mix Assistant Vatsal Chevli

Directed by Nazeef Mohammed
Edited by Allan Fernandes 
DOP : Ronnel Parmar
Conceptualisation by Nazeef Mohammed and Allan Fernandes
Motion Graphics Director : Mayur Sharma
3D Artist : Parth Reshamwala
Face Mapping : Prashant Bhikadia
Illustrator : Robin Chakraborty
Graded by Mayur Sharma and Nitesse
Offline Edit by Sagar Parikh
Assistant Editor : Yogesh Chandravanshi
Additional Artwork : Gayathri Sankaran

Choreography : Shakti Mohan 
Assistant Choreography : Somya Kautia, NrityaShakti
Dancers : Mukta Nagpal and Parth Sethi , NrityaShakti 

Production Team : Parth Shah, Renish Kotodia, Rohan Shetty, Deep Dave and Meher Singh
Project Coordinators : Smrithi Menon and Khushboo Gugle
Video Conceptualised , Produced and Post Produced at BToS Productions

Distributed by : Believe Digital

Lyrics :-
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan angana morey 
Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan... Angana Morey.. Angana Morey..

(Music)

Raag preet ka tumne sunaya 
Saat suron mein mohe sajaya 

Tere moh mein aise
Man bheetar mehak rahi hun

Is peedh ko samjho piya 
Haan is peedh ko samjho piya
Jiya ab na maane 

Aao sajan angana morey
Aao sajan angana morey 
Din rain tumari yaad sataye
Aao sajan

(Music)

Aao.. Sajan aao.. aaa..
Sajan laagi.. 
Laagi mohe jog piya.. 
Sajan... 
Aao sajan angana morey..
Aao sajan..

snippet.title: Molkki | मोलक्की  | Ep. 58 | Vaibhav's Conspiracy Against Virendra!
snippet.description:
After getting married to Priyashi, Vaibhav swears to wreak vengeance against Virendra and Purvi for ruining his life. Subsequently, he deviously knits a master plan to trick Virendra into buying a worthless piece of land for a big fortune. Will Virendra fall into his trap?

#ColorsTV #Molkki

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KuHOl0qHTVJCjSJRfYXZ9sk

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Purvi, a Molkki Dulhan finds herself in an arranged marriage to Virender, a widowed man twice her age and still in love with his dead wife. Soon, she discovers that she has been “sold” by her father and is merely a clause for the inheritance of his uncle’s land. Will she stand up and fight for her dignity? Will her marital deal blossom into a loving relationship?

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario | Promo Video | Jump Cuts 2.0 | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Have you had a savage ghost moment? Jump Cuts presents a promo video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. Later, he gets a call from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario.” Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts

Directed by : Naresh Dillibabu

Cinematography : Jerin Auxilium
Editor : Vignesh Chakkaravarthy

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario.” Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts

snippet.title: The Power of Gayatri Mantra | Sadhguru
snippet.description:
Sadhguru speaks about the significance of Gayatri mantra in a spiritual seeker’s life and shares a real-life story of a lady who lost her voice due to improper chanting of the mantra.

#Sadhguru
Yogi, mystic and visionary, Sadhguru is a spiritual master with a difference. An arresting blend of profundity and pragmatism, his life and work serves as a reminder that yoga is a contemporary science, vitally relevant to our times. 

----------------------------------------
In the Grace of Yoga” with Sadhguru is a unique Yoga program that offers an in-depth exploration of the five elements (earth, water, air, fire, and space), their significance, their manifestation within us and an opportunity to learn powerful tools for their purification. By purifying and mastering the five elements, or pancha bhutas, you can bring your body and mind to a vibrant state of health and rejuvenation.

snippet.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
snippet.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.

localized.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
localized.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.

snippet.title: Babita Aur Iyer Ko Jetha Se Urgent Kaam!  |  Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता - Ep 3095
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt

Background Music: Sunil Patni

snippet.title: ആകാശദൂതിലെ നാലു കുട്ടികള്‍ ഇപ്പോള്‍ എവിടെന്ന് കണ്ടോ l akashadoothu movie child actors
snippet.description:
കേരളത്തിലെ തിയേറ്ററുകളില്‍ നൊമ്പരമായി പെയ്തിറങ്ങിയ ചിത്രമായിരുന്നു ആകാശദൂത്. കേരളത്തിലെ മാത്രമല്ല അന്യഭാഷാ പ്രേക്ഷർക്ക് ഉൾപ്പടെ ഹൃദയത്തിൽ സ്പർശിച്ച സിനിമയാണ് ആകശദൂത്. ഒരു സിനിമ അയി കാണുന്നതിലുപരി അവരുടെ ജീവിതം യാഥാർഥ്യമായി കണ്ടവരാണ് പ്രേക്ഷകർ. അത്രമാത്രം ഈ സിനിമ ആളുകളിൽ മാറ്റം ഉണ്ടാക്കി. സിബി മലയിൽ സംവിധാനം ചെയ്ത് 1993 ൽ പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയ മലയാള ചലച്ചിത്രമാണ് ആകാശദൂത്. ഡെന്നീസ്‌ ജോസഫ്‌ ആയിരുന്നു തിരക്കഥ ഒരുക്കിയത്. 1993-ലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച ചലച്ചിത്രത്തിനുള്ള ദേശീയ അവാർഡ് ഈ സിനിമ നേടി. മുരളി, മാധവി എന്നിവരായിരുന്നു പ്രധാന വേഷങ്ങളിൽ അഭിനയിച്ചത്. കൂടാതെ ജഗതി ശ്രീകുമാർ, നെടുമുടി വേണു, എൻ.എഫ്. വർഗ്ഗീസ്, ബിന്ധു പണിക്കർ തുടങ്ങിയവരും അഭിനയിച്ചിരുന്നു.1983-ൽ അമേരിക്കൻ ടെലിവിഷൻ ചിത്രമായ Who will love my Children ചില മാറ്റങ്ങളോടെ മലയാളത്തിൽ ആവിഷ്കരിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു. മനസ്സില്‍ ഇന്നും തീരാനൊമ്പരമായി നില്‍ക്കുന്ന ചിത്രമാണിത്. മാതാപിതാക്കളുടെ മരണത്തോടു കൂടി അനാഥരായിപ്പോകുന്ന നാലു കുരുന്നുകളുടെ കഥ പറഞ്ഞ ചിത്രം ഇന്നും പ്രേക്ഷകര്‍ ഓര്‍ത്തിരിക്കുന്നുണ്ട. നാല് സഹോദരങ്ങളുടെ കഥ പറഞ്ഞ ചിത്രത്തിന്റെ അവസാനത്തിൽ കുട്ടികൾ മുഴുവൻ ഓരോ സ്ഥലത്താവും. പോളിയോ ബാധിച്ച കുട്ടിയെ ഏറ്റെടുക്കാനായി മാത്രം ആരും മുന്നോട്ട് വന്നില്ല. പ്രേക്ഷക മനസ്സില്‍ ഏറെ നൊമ്പരമായി നിന്നിരുന്നതും ഈ കുരുന്നായിരുന്നു. ഇന്നും ആ സിനിമ കണ്ടാൽ കരയാത്തതായി ആരുമില്ല.

#MartinKorah​ #SeenaAntony #Akashadoothu​ #Madhavi​ #Murali​ #Roni​ #JosephAntony​ #Tony​ #KuthiravattamPappu​ #Chaandy​ #PremPrakash​ #NedumudiVenu​ #FrVattappara​ #JagathySreekumar​ #chemmachen​ #JosePrakash​ #AaranmullaPonnamma​ #Annaamma​ #Thikkurissy​ #SuvarnaMathew​ #mini​ #KPACLalitha​ #NFVarghese​ #BinduPanicker​ #Indrans

snippet.title: വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീനിൽ അലക്കിയ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർ ഈ രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടാതിരിക്കാൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കണം. ഷെയർ
snippet.description:
തിരക്കേറിയ നമ്മുടെ ജീവിതത്തിനിടയിൽ വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീൻ ഇന്ന് ഒഴിവാക്കാനാകില്ല. പക്ഷെ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട ഒരു കാര്യം.. പതിവായി വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീനിൽ അലക്കിയ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് ചില രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടാൻ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്. ഈ അവസ്ഥ ഉണ്ടാകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ ?
0:00 Start
2:20  രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ?
6:00 അടിവസ്ത്രം പകര്‍ച്ചവ്യാദിക്ക് കാരണമാകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ ?
7:37 വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീന്‍ എങ്ങനെ  അണുവിമുക്തമാക്കാം ?

 ഈ രോഗങ്ങളെ എങ്ങനെ തടയാൻ സാധിക്കും ? വളരെ പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ. നിങ്ങൾ പൊതുസമൂഹത്തിന്റെ അറിവിലേക്കായി ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുക.. ഒരുപാടു കുടുംബങ്ങൾക്ക് ഈ അറിവ് ഉപകാരപ്പെടും. 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: Rogue Queen Takes It All (Clash Of Clans Season Challenges)
snippet.description:
It's an all new season of Season Challenges and Gold Pass full of exciting tasks, rewards, and perks! The all new Rogue Queen Hero Skin awaits you! 


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

#clashofclans #seasonchallenges

snippet.title: OMG see what i found in my bag !! **Warning | Anishka Khantwaal |
snippet.description:
Hello everyone! Here I am with yet another video for you all i.e. "What's in my bag?!".
Everyone asks me about things I carry in my bag all the time. So finally, here I am disclosing all the stuff my bag carries for me when I am out.

You may find tissues, masks, bills, and many more things. So do watch to find out similarities in your bags and mine!
.
.
.
.

snippet.title: Union Budget 2021-22 Highlights And Analysis
snippet.description:
Presenting the Union Budget for 2021-22, Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman said that the Budget proposals for this financial year rest on six pillars — health and well-being, physical and financial capital and infrastructure, inclusive development for aspirational India, reinvigorating human capital, innovation and R&D, and 'Minimum Government, Maximum Governance'.

snippet.title: Highlights - ATK Mohun Bagan 3-2 Kerala Blasters - Match 78 | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
ATK Mohun Bagan pulled off a stunning comeback, beating Kerala Blasters 3-2 at the Fatorda Stadium. Gary Hooper's first-half screamer and Costa Nhamoinesu 51st minute goal put Kibu Vicuna's side in firm control of the contest. But ATKMB's new signing Marcelinho, reignited hope with a debut goal and Roy Krishna's brace helped complete a comeback and seal a famous win for Antonio Lopez Habas' side!

What was your favourite moment from #ATKMBKBFC? Let us know in the comments below 👇 

#HeroISL #LetsFootball

snippet.description:
सोनी मराठीवरील महाराष्ट्राची हास्यजत्रा कार्यक्रमात गौरव, समीर आणि  प्रसादचं धमाकेदार स्किट बघायला मिळणार आहे. गौरवला टक्कल पडल्याचा समीरला भलताच आनंद झालाय, पहा या स्किटची खास झलक,पाहायला विसरू नका महाराष्ट्राची हास्य जत्रा बुधवार आणि गुरुवार रात्री ९ वाजता फक्त सोनी मराठीवर .

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 02 Feb 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat chaturthi | Sankashti Chaturthi Ki katha
snippet.description:
This Video shows two stories of Til Chauth vrat or . Til Chauth is also called Sankashti Chaturthi, Sakat Chauth, Sankat Chaturthi. Til Chauth vrat is observed on the Chaturthi of Krishna Paksha of Magh maas. Til Kutte is offered to Shri Ganesh Ji and Chauth Mata on the day of sakat choth.   Tilakuta is made by crushing sesame and jaggery together.
Women observe this fast for the longevity and success of their husband and son. This fast destroys all kinds of crises and provides happiness and prosperity.
On this day of Sakat chauth, women keep a fast for the whole day and worship Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata in the evening. On observing the moon at night, the fast is completed. Let's watch the  Til Chauth Vrat Katha and pray to lord ganesh and sakata mata.

तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat Chauth Katha
आज मैं आप सभी के समक्ष तिल चौथ अथवा  संकट चौथ व्रत की  दो कथाएं  प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। तिल चौथ का व्रत माघ मास की कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी को किया जाता हैं| इस दिन श्री गणेश जी व चौथ माता  को तिल कुट्टे का भोग लगाया जाता हैं |  तिलकुटा  तिल और गुड़ को  एक साथ कूटकर बनाया जाता है।
यह व्रत स्त्रिया अपने पति व पुत्र की दीर्घायु और सफलता के लिए करती हैं |  यह व्रत सभी प्रकार के संकटों  का नाश करता है और सुख समृद्धि प्रदान करता है।
इस दिन स्त्रिया  पूरा दिन व्रत रख कर शाम को गणेश जी व चौथ माता का पूजन  पूजन  करती हैं।  रात को चन्द्रमा को अर्ध्य  देने  पर व्रत पूर्ण हो जाता है। आइए शुरू करते हैं तिल चौथ की पहली कथा...

#tilchauthvratkatha  #sankatChauthVratKatha #ganesh  #chauthmata

The lyrics of the new song are penned by Yo Yo Honey Singh, Lil Golu, Hommie Dilliwala & music produced by Yo Yo Honey Singh. The video is directed by Mihir Gulati.

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

snippet.title: OUR FIRST INTERNATIONAL TRIP TO DUBAI ( Jaanu Enjoyed Alot ) | Emirates Flight
snippet.description:
Hiiii all ❤ THIS IS OUR FIRST INTERNATIONAL TRIP TO DUBAI. We travelled in emirates and its one of the best experience... The ambiance, hospitality and everything was so nice.... We tried to show everything to you guys so that you will also feel like traveling with us... So the dubai series starts here and you will see alot of videos in dubai from today!!  Don't miss anything coz its all fun.. 
Make sure you subscribe to us and share our videos with your friends so that they can enjoy ❤😍

Our Official Insta Page - https://www.instagram.com/ramwithjaanu.official/?hl=en

Love
Ram with Jaanu

Keerthi Shrathah channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCs2k3NNHl5iqt2sExe2cu_w

RAMs Instagram id - https://www.instagram.com/raam_me/?hl=en 

Jaanu's Instagram id - https://www.instagram.com/keerthishrathah/?hl=en

snippet.title: EMIWAY - WHAT CAN I DO (PROD. BY FLAMBOY) (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Lyrics given below 

Artist /lyrics : Emiway Bantai 
Prod/ music : Flamboy 
Mix &master : Emiway Bantai
Director / dop : Canfuse
Associate director : Sankalp Vaid 
EDIT : Riddhi Hadkar
COLOURIST : Canfuse
Production- Bantai Studio 
Production management- Minta ,Sumit singh
Line production- Sankalp Vaid 
Production Asst. - Akash Gurram, Mohan Shetty 
Makeup- Shyam Shrilal Vishwakarma 
BTS  : Akash Singh,  Shubham Bandhal, & Sumit Fanse

Streaming on All Audio Platforms :

Apple Music – https://music.apple.com/in/album/what-can-i-do-single/1550885290 
Spotify – https://open.spotify.com/track/3iAe6EeL2sDubF42mCadsF 
Amazon Music – https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08V59VMR9?marketplaceId=A21TJRUUN4KGV&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08V4B4T32 
YouTube Music – https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=XG73UQhA9RQ&feature=share 
Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSEBBb4B/ 
Hungama – https://www.hungama.com/song/what-can-i-do/61789691/ 
JioSaavn – https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/what-can-i-do/L14nHBJUbR4 
Wynk – https://wynk.in/music/song/bhula-dunga/bl_A10320WT037785766X 
Gaana – https://gaana.com/album/what-can-i-do-hindi

Lyrics
(Hook)
Boht sara hype hai apne pass bro 
God bless uh hope u all grow 
Patte chupake rakhela 
Nai karra show 
Nai bolna bro 
Agar tere woh 
dil se na ho 
Vibe nahi match kre 
Milte nai bro 
Jagah full pakdele 
Hilte nai bro 
Sab kare copy mera tareeka 
What can i do 

What can i do (x2)
What can i do yoo
What can i fo 
i got the views 
They wanna walk in my shoes 
What can i do (x3)
What can i do 
I got the moves 
They wanna walk in my shoes


Chapne do bhai 
Style mera dhapne do bhai 
Fame ke bhook mei 
Karrele nakli ladai 
Rapper log banrele bhai 
Kya toh sikhaye tumlogo 
Ke gane se 
Ek hi baat batarele ye zamanse 
Farak nai padta mujhe abhi kisi ke jane se 
Dil ko sambhal warna toot jayega kisiko
Chahnese 
Boht kuch seekhaya mei logo ko gaane 
Bandhiya bhi toh marti apne gaane pe 
Aisehich thodi na alag wajab 
Apan ayele cash deke gaadi pe 
Selected public invited hai party mei 
Dikhna tha smarty toh kam ki daadi mei 
Haters log latakrele mere Naadi mei 
Inkyamaakya apanich hard hai be 

(Hook)

Itne views lana lala tere bas ka nai 
Seedha shot dete bala 
Khota bajta nai 
Sadak ki boli lekin daam apna 
Sasta nai 
Nakli swag video mei lala jachta nai 
Karne kar par 
asal wala feel la 
Emiway fan base 
Dekhe beta sabka bheja hilla 
Diss gane fekde toh 
Chaddi bhi gilla 
Naklipan video mei aur koi ni milla ?

Ye bhai bante video mei 
Apan kulfa karate aise logo ko audio mei 
Jis jis se bhidjate us us ko pel dete 
Baki jo firak mei baithele unlog ko
Tel dete bolte chal masal 
Apan hai asal 
Logo ko pasand 
Har ek gana apna 
Rehta jashan 
Bakiyo ki baatcheet  
 La*da aur lassan 
Meko ni pasand 
Inlog ki soch 
Apni toh public hai dost
Vip meeting no easy approach 
Kaise kiya mei 
Ab baithke tu soch 
Mei mere dost
kamare fatte 
Blessing hai life 
Machare fatte
Nai chaiye advice 

Ua bitch is my ex bro
M receiving text bro 
Its my turn to flex bro 
I own what i manifest bro 
Soo soo many eyes on me 
blessed bro
I Got no time to waste bro 
If uh wanna move 
There are soo many ways bro
M livin my life at the best bro 
Lessgooo 🔥
(Hook)

#emiway #whatcanido #bantai
